Transcript
Transcript
Transcript
We're Comfy and we're building an operating system for generative AI. Comfy is a workflow tool that allow users to generate media using all the top AI models. Users have full control and ownership over what they generate, where they generate the power of Confused to give that control over to the creatives. We've raised 70 million in total. I created Comfy as an open source project. Even as it evolves, it's always going to stay open source. Because that's the strength of Comfy. We are a very focused and dedicated team. We want to hire people deeply passionate about visual AI so we can build the best creative tooling AI startup. We're going to continue to expand the comfy user ecosystem. Our goal is to empower more than 50% of the creativity in the world. We're already on our way there. Come with your ideas and speak your mind. That's what's going to keep comfy great, come join us.
Scott W.
